global.description: The ad features a teal background with various shapes and text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting DriftPass for weekend travel deals.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.description: A large, light teal rectangular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.description: A light teal oval shape overlapping with the rectangular shape in the center.
